prompt: In Calendar, find the event titled 'KinBench Find Me' that's scheduled for tomorrow. Note the time it starts and write that time (in HH:MM 24-hour format) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/017-found-time.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'calendar find_events_with_summary "KinBench Find Me" ~/Desktop/kinbench/017-found-time.txt' then format the HH:MM start time from the output.
